# hetzner-robot_ssh_key (Data Source)

Look up an SSH key in the Robot key store by **name** (via `GET /key`) or by **fingerprint**. Provide exactly one of `name` or `fingerprint`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# by name
data "hetzner-robot_ssh_key" "by_name" {
  name = "k8s-node-key"
}

# by fingerprint
data "hetzner-robot_ssh_key" "by_fingerprint" {
  fingerprint = "aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff:00:11:22:33:44:55:66:77:88:99"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `fingerprint` (String) Key fingerprint. Provide either name or fingerprint to look up a key.
- `name` (String) Key name. Provide either name or fingerprint to look up a key.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation date
- `data` (String) Key data in OpenSSH or SSH2 format
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `size` (Number) Key size in bits
- `type` (String) Key algorithm type
